name: Jerry Wang Ruihan
headerTaglineFour: from Fuzhou live in Hangzhou, China.

skills.title: Mobile App Development
skills.description: Proficient in using Java to develop Android applications and using Swift to create and deploy iOS applications.

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.description: Skilled in using React for frontend development and deployment of web applications.

skills.title: Prototyping
skills.description: Expert in using Figma for creating detailed prototypes and UI/UX designs.

skills.title: Multilingual
skills.description: Fluent in Chinese, English, and Japanese(N2).

aboutpara: I believe in the power of interdisciplinary integration to spark innovation and solve complex problems. As a developer, designer, and HCI engineer, I strive for the harmonious blend of technology and aesthetics, always prioritizing user-centric approaches to create intuitive, efficient, and delightful interactive experiences. By merging knowledge and skills from various fields, I aim to design products that are not only functionally robust but also visually appealing, providing genuine value to users. Currently, I am a Master's student at Zhejiang University, where I continue to develop my expertise and pursue cutting-edge research in these areas. My guiding principles include innovation-driven exploration, user-first design, balanced aesthetics and functionality, and continuous learning to stay at the forefront of my fields, thus driving the evolution of human-computer interaction through impactful creations.

resume.tagline: 👋  I'm a software engineer, product designer, interaction researcher.
resume.description: I have delivered world-class user experiences to millions of people. Well-versed with React, Javascript, and most of the Web frameworks.

experiences.bullets: Worked on the frontend of a React application, Worked on the frontend of a React application
